settingsDialog.title: Workshop Templates
settingsDialog.description: Use $modName as a placeholder for the project name.

loginDialog.title: Steam Login
loginDialog.description: Enter your Steam credentials to publish to the Workshop.
loginDialog.steamGuardDescription: If you use a Steam Mobile Authenticator, enter the 5-character rotating code here. You can also leave it empty and enter it when prompted.

steamGuardDialog.title: Steam Guard
steamGuardDialog.description:
Enter the 5-character code from your Steam Mobile app.
Open the Steam app → Steam Guard → use the rotating code shown on screen.
steamGuardDialog.note: Note: approving the push notification is not enough — steamcmd requires the code.

steamcmdDialog.title: SteamCMD Required
steamcmdDialog.subtitle: Valve command-line tool for Workshop uploads
steamcmdDialog.confirmText: SteamCMD (~3 MB) is required to publish items to the Steam Workshop. It will be downloaded from Valve's CDN and installed automatically.
steamcmdDialog.confirmText2: This tool is provided by Valve and is safe to use. It will be stored in the application data folder.
steamcmdDialog.successMessage: You can now publish to the Steam Workshop.

onboarding.title: Publishing on the Steam Workshop
onboarding.description: This app cannot create a brand-new Workshop entry directly. A bug in the game launcher prevents mods uploaded outside of it from appearing in subscribers' launchers, so the very first publication of a translation mod must go through the original game launcher. Every subsequent update can then be pushed straight from this screen.
onboarding.step1: Publish the mod once through the original game launcher.
onboarding.step2: Copy the Workshop ID assigned by Steam: it appears in the mod's Workshop URL (e.g. "3661242610").
onboarding.step3: Paste that ID into the dedicated field for this mod in the app.
onboarding.step4: Use the "Update" button to push every future translation update from this screen.

confirmLeave.title: Publication in Progress
confirmLeave.message: A batch publication is currently in progress. Are you sure you want to leave? The upload will be cancelled.

confirmCancel.title: Cancel Batch Publish?
confirmCancel.message: Remaining uploads will be aborted. Already-uploaded items are not rolled back.
